name: io.github.dversum/mcp-server
description: Manage clients, projects, tasks, invoices, time tracking & calendar in dVersum.

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your dVersum API (e.g. https://api.dversum.com/api/v1)
environmentVariables.name: DVERSUM_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Your dVersum JWT authentication token (get it from Settings > API Tokens)
environmentVariables.name: DVERSUM_API_TOKEN
